depends_on: data_history/panel/daily_prices.parquet (from fetch_daily_panel.py, fetched by Data Engineer agent)
data_history/sector_mapping.json (from fetch_sector_mapping.py, fetched by Sector Mapping agent)

what_to_implement.module_signature: compute_swing_signals(daily_panel: pd.DataFrame, as_of: date, members: list[str], config: dict | None = None) -> dict[ts_code, dict]
what_to_implement.returns: Per-ticker dict with {composite: float [0-100], signal_layers: {breakout: 0/1, momentum_5d: float, rsi_14: float, macd_cross: 0/1, volume_spike: 0/1, atr_pos: float, limit_up_followup: 0/1}, vetoes: [list of any triggered veto names]}

technical_factors.rsi_14: Wilder RSI(14); gate to keep only stocks in [40, 70] band
technical_factors.macd_cross: MACD(12,26,9): bullish iff MACD > signal AND signal increasing 3d; binary
technical_factors.limit_up_followup: T-1 was 涨停 (close ≥ pre_close * 1.099) AND T-1 close == T-1 high; binary

vetoes: recent_stop_loss (placeholder; needs position_state input — leave as TODO)
suspended_recent_3d (NaN close in last 3 trade dates)
what_to_implement.missing_data_policy: Any factor with NaN inputs returns None; composite uses available factors only with renormalized weights. If <4 factors available, composite returns None (skip stock).
what_to_implement.PIT_discipline: All factor windows look back ONLY. as_of slices the daily panel to trade_date <= as_of. No forward-fill, no centering.

selftest_requirements: Synthetic fixture: 5 tickers × 60 days. Construct 1 ticker with clean breakout pattern → should score high. 1 ticker flat → should score low. 1 ticker with NaN block → should return None composite.
PIT test: factor at as_of=T must be identical regardless of whether store has data at T+1 (mimics tests/test_pit_no_look_ahead.py pattern).
Determinism: same inputs → same outputs (no random).
out_of_scope: Microstructure factors (主力净流入/龙虎榜) — gated on Tushare 3-API per memory; STUB ONLY if data unavailable
return_signature: Update this file with: status, files_written, tests_run output, test_gate_results, brief notes. Then T1 will integrate.
